case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. MELISSA B. WILSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANTS; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
